import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let l2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_ints(l1)
  let b = parse_ints(l2)

  mut inter: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
        inter = list.push(inter, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = inter
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
      mut removed = false
      mut j = 0
      while j < remaining.len()
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          if v == m and not removed
            removed = true
          else
            new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      remaining = new_rem
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  if sorted.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut out = ""
    mut k = 0
    while k < sorted.len()
      match sorted.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if k == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
